DocumentationSubject.Summary: `meta-multi-dimensional` creates sanctioned MetaMultiDimensional workspaces for modeling multidimensional analytics artifacts.
Required. Directory where the empty MetaMultiDimensional workspace will be created.
Create modeled objects on an Analysis Services multidimensional instance.
MetaMultiDimensional workspace to deploy. Defaults to the current directory.
Optional target database name. Defaults to the modeled database name.
Drop an existing target database before create/deploy.
Deploy metadata only and skip full processing.
Promote a processed multidimensional database through backup and restore.
Required. Source Analysis Services server containing the processed database.
Required. Target database name to restore.
Required. Backup file path accessible to the Analysis Services service accounts.
Drop an existing target database before restore.
Drop a multidimensional database from an Analysis Services multidimensional instance.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
